questions.text: When you think about your personal style and what you wear day-to-day — are you someone who has a pretty defined 'look' or uniform, or do you switch it up a lot? Any specific brands or pieces you consistently reach for?

When it comes to music — besides the context of when you listen (work, workouts, etc.) — what are you actually into? Any specific artists, albums, or playlists you love? Do you have a go-to when you want to discover new stuff?

When you think about coffee — beyond your daily drink — are you particular about the beans, roast level, or brewing method? Do you seek out specific cafes when you're in a new city, or is good coffee just a nice bonus?

How do you stay informed about what's happening in the world — news, tech industry updates, or things happening in the places you live? Do you follow specific sources, newsletters, Twitter/X, podcasts, or just kind of stay in your bubble?

When it comes to photography — do you have any interest in it beyond just capturing memories? Like, do you think about composition, editing your photos, or even showing them to people? Or is it more of a 'point and shoot, it sits on my phone' thing?
